recommended_exercises.Name: Running
recommended_exercises.Description: Sustained jogging or running at moderate to high intensity
recommended_exercises.Benefits: Improves cardiovascular fitness burns calories and boosts mood

recommended_exercises.Name: Jump Rope
recommended_exercises.Description: Continuously jump over a rotating rope
recommended_exercises.Benefits: Highly efficient cardio improves coordination and agility

recommended_exercises.Name: Jumping Jacks
recommended_exercises.Description: Jump feet apart while raising arms overhead then return
recommended_exercises.Benefits: Simple effective warm-up and cardio exercise
